caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a studio. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm and is looking toward the left of the frame. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt. To the right, clothing racks with various garments are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left with a circular emblem and the text "SHIT" and another on the right in red and white text that reads "SHIT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a relatively static position, maintaining a focused expression while slightly adjusting his gaze.
